query_results.note: PLC/DID-web lookup; not a label_events query. Audit confirms by inspection that the resolution path does not fall back to a label_events scan on cache miss.

query_results.sql: SELECT labeler_did, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM label_events WHERE target_did = ? GROUP BY labeler_did
explain_query_plan: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY

query_results.purpose: Per (labeler, val) rollup against subject (count + first_seen + last_seen).
query_results.sql: SELECT labeler_did, val, COUNT(*) AS event_count, MIN(ts) AS first_seen, MAX(ts) AS last_seen FROM label_events WHERE target_did = ? GROUP BY labeler_did, val
explain_query_plan: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY

query_results.purpose: MAX(ts) per (labeler_did, val) — folded into Q3 (MAX in same GROUP BY).
query_results.note: Subsumed by another query in this inventory.

query_results.purpose: Pure-function classify_authority_effect over (labeler_did, val) tuples from Q3.
query_results.note: Pure-function map (classify_authority_effect) over Q3 result set. No DB scan.

query_results.sql: SELECT labeler_did, regime_state, auditability, last_seen, events_7d, events_30d FROM labelers WHERE labeler_did = ?

query_results.purpose: Auditability dial per labeler — folded into Q6 (same row).
query_results.note: Subsumed by another query in this inventory.

query_results.purpose: COUNT(DISTINCT val||'|'||neg) per labeler — drives classification_changed flag without per-row fetch.
query_results.sql: SELECT labeler_did, COUNT(DISTINCT val || '|' || neg) AS distinct_states FROM label_events WHERE target_did = ? GROUP BY labeler_did
explain_query_plan: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY

query_results.purpose: Per (labeler, locus) event count via CASE-bucketed GROUP BY. Drives locus_counts dict directly.
query_results.sql: SELECT labeler_did, CASE WHEN uri LIKE 'did:%' THEN 'account' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.feed.post/%' THEN 'post' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.actor.profile/%' THEN 'profile' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.graph.list/%' THEN 'list' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.graph.listitem/%' THEN 'list_item' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.feed.generator/%' THEN 'feed_generator' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%/app.bsky.graph.starterpack/%' THEN 'starterpack' WHEN uri LIKE 'at://%' THEN 'record' ELSE 'unknown' END AS locus, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM label_events WHERE target_did = ? GROUP BY labeler_did, locus
explain_query_plan: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY

query_results.purpose: Per (labeler, uri, val) rollup over non-account events, capped via window function to top-N URIs per labeler.
query_results.sql: WITH per_uri_val AS (   SELECT labeler_did, uri, val,          COUNT(*) AS val_count,          MIN(ts) AS first_seen,          MAX(ts) AS last_seen   FROM label_events   WHERE target_did = ? AND uri NOT LIKE 'did:%'   GROUP BY labeler_did, uri, val ), uri_totals AS (   SELECT labeler_did, uri, SUM(val_count) AS uri_total   FROM per_uri_val   GROUP BY labeler_did, uri ), ranked AS (   SELECT labeler_did, uri, uri_total,          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (           PARTITION BY labeler_did ORDER BY uri_total DESC, uri         ) AS rn   FROM uri_totals ) SELECT puv.labeler_did, puv.uri, puv.val, puv.val_count,        puv.first_seen, puv.last_seen, r.uri_total FROM per_uri_val puv JOIN ranked r ON r.labeler_did = puv.labeler_did AND r.uri = puv.uri WHERE r.rn <= ? ORDER BY puv.labeler_did, r.rn, puv.val
explain_query_plan: USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY
USE TEMP B-TREE FOR GROUP BY
USE TEMP B-TREE FOR ORDER BY
SEARCH puv USING AUTOMATIC COVERING INDEX (uri=? AND labeler_did=?)
USE TEMP B-TREE FOR ORDER BY
